strengths: Mirrors existing toolTrace.ts pattern exactly (filter+concat, pickContent mirrors pickToolTraceForColumn)
Pure functions with zero side effects — no React, no DOM, no DB
Scoping uses strict equality on both boardId AND columnSlug, preventing EC3 cross-board bleed
Comprehensive test suite: happy path, missing keys (EC3 regression), cross-board isolation, pickContent both branches
JSDoc explains reasoning (EC3 reference) rather than just restating params

issues.description: `pickContent` uses `live && live.length > 0` — the `&& live.length > 0` is redundant since empty string is already falsy. `live || db` would suffice. Not a bug, just a readability nit.
